title: Region Protect
description: Adds basic No Edit areas functionality
body:
Allows you to designate certain areas of the world as uneditable to Survial Mode players

Switches any survival mode players in the region to Adventure Mode while inside, and automatically switches them back when they leave

Works in all dimensions! Fully Multiplayer Compatible!

Usage:
/function region_protect:rp_create to Create a region
Move to the Lowest southwestern corner of your region (the lowest XYZ value) and click Set Minimum
Move to the Highest Northeastern corner of your region (the highest XYZ value) and click Set Maximum
Click Rename to Gove it a name you'll remember, and you're done!
If you want to remove it, you can click Delete

To remove a region, get close to it and run
/function region_protect:rp_remove

It will confirm the name before you blow it away
